name: Spumoni Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Finely chopped maraschino cherries, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter, sugar, vanilla, and egg. Stir in flour and salt.
2. Divide dough into 3 equal parts.
3. In one part, mix nuts and food coloring.
4. In another part, mix chocolate with the remaining dough.
5. Place the cherry mixture on top of the chocolate layer.
6. Line a loaf pan (9x5x3 inches) with aluminum foil, extending it over the ends by 5 inches.
7. Press nut dough evenly into the bottom of the pan.
8. Spread chocolate dough over the nut dough.
9. Cover with foil and refrigerate for at least 2 hours but no longer than six weeks.
10. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
11. Remove foil and dough from the pan; set aside.
12. Cut the dough crosswise into 1/4-inch slices, then halve each slice.
13. Place cookies about 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
14. Bake for about 10 minutes or until set.
15. Remove immediately from the cookie sheet.
